name: stripe

setup.server_init:
import Stripe from 'stripe';
const stripe = new Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY!, { apiVersion: '2024-12-18.acacia' });

create_checkout_session.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session for one-time or subscription payments

create_payment_intent.description: Create a PaymentIntent for custom payment flows

webhook_handler.important: Always verify webhook signatures. Never trust unverified webhook data.

create_product_and_price.description: Create a product with a recurring price
create_product_and_price.returns: Price object with .id to use in checkout

cancel_subscription.description: Cancel a subscription at period end

create_portal_session.description: Create a customer portal session for self-service

common_mistakes: Using stripe.charges.create() instead of checkout.sessions.create() -- Charges API is legacy
Not handling subscription.deleted events (users keep access after cancellation)
Amounts are in cents, not dollars (2000 = $20.00)
Not setting apiVersion in Stripe constructor
